channel.title: Rx Shortage Radar
channel.description: Latest public FDA drug shortage records from openFDA.

item.title: Current: Amphetamine Aspartate Monohydrate, Amphetamine Sulfate, Dextroamphetamine Saccharate, Dextroamphetamine Sulfate Tablet (42806-339-01)
